text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's New Year's Day. I thought we'd hold a
meeting in anticipation of her upcoming classic
year, when the real races start, but...

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Athbhliain faoi mhaise duit! Happy New Year! ♪
choice_data_list:
Happy New Year... And what have you got
there?

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Oh, these? I've just been doing a little shopping!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Isn't New Year's in Japan just delightful?! I'd
heard stories, but everything is truly lively!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
They call these lucky bags, correct? There's
happiness packed right inside each one! What a
splendid custom. ♪

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
...Perhaps a little too much happiness. They are
rather heavy.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Now, I believe we had a meeting scheduled,
correct? We'll be discussing my upcoming Triple
Tiara tour and how to prepare for the... Queen
Elizabeth II... Cup...

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
I'm just going to go out there and run with
everything I have! Do you have anything to add?
choice_data_list: Let's do our best this year! Meeting adjourned!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Really?! That's it? You wrapped that up so
wonderfully fast!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Then it's time to open these lucky bags! ♪ Yay! ♪

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
I'm especially intrigued by these three. Which
should I open, Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I check the bags that Fine Motion is pointing at.
choice_data_list: The one limited to the first ten customers.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Excellent choice! Purchasing that one proved
incredibly difficult.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
I must be blessed with great luck, though, as I got
the last one. Now, let's see what we've got here...

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Oh? It's a pair of shoes!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
From the bag emerges a pair of children's shoes
that light up as you walk.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Oh, so that's why there were so many parents
lined up with their children!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Hmmm, these light-up shoes are wonderful... but as much as I like them, it is clear who these should go to.

text_block_list.name: Children
text_block_list.text:
Wow! They're so cool!
Thanks so much!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, I'm so glad you like them. ♪ Now how
about you put on those new shoes and race me?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After New Year's, Fine Motion buys more shoes
and donates them to the local welfare facility for
children in need.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
I wonder what kind of bread is inside. How
exciting! ♪

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Oh! I have a splendid idea...

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Simply scrumptious! ♪ The best way to enjoy
bread is at a picnic!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Oh, Trainer, is that a red bean bun? It looks
delicious!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, Fine Motion and I have a relaxing time
eating all kinds of bread.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Hehe, that one sounds rather fun.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Let's see what we have here...

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Some kind of... large paper fan?

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Oh, is this a famous item?

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
I don't really understand, but I do have this urge
to wave it around!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Like this, perhaps... Hehe. ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
...There's no way she could have known the
dance, but Fine Motion somehow manages to do
it just right by pure instinct.
